calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patriia VanSteenberge.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ambassador Hotel SRO Associates, a California limited partnership.
Plaintiff's Witness: Garland Hall, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Kevin Clark.
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three-Day Notice----------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 55 Mason St., #212, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back Rent and Damages $1,392.26
Attorney Fee $400.00
Waived Costs, for a Total of $1,792.26
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibits in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL S. ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF AMBASSADOR HOTEL SRO ASSOCIATES
DEFENDANT KEVIN CLARK NOT PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

CLERK: NANCY REGAS/NOT REPORTED (218)
